name: @hasna/projects
description: High-level project management CLI, MCP server, SDK, and AI SDK agent loop for coding agents

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/cli/index.ts --outdir dist/cli --target bun --external pg --external @hasna/contracts --external @hasna/contracts/auth --external @hasna/contracts/schemas && bun build src/mcp/index.ts --outdir dist/mcp --target bun --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external pg --external @hasna/contracts --external @hasna/contracts/auth --external @hasna/contracts/schemas && bun build src/serve/index.ts --outdir dist/serve --target bun --external pg --external @hasna/contracts --external @hasna/contracts/auth --external @hasna/contracts/sdk && bun build src/serve/app.ts --outdir dist/serve --target bun --external pg --external @hasna/contracts --external @hasna/contracts/auth --external @hasna/contracts/sdk && bun build src/sdk/index.ts --outdir dist/sdk --target bun && bun build src/index.ts src/project-store.ts src/project-dashboard.ts src/storage.ts --outdir dist --target bun --external pg --external @hasna/contracts --external @hasna/contracts/auth --external @hasna/contracts/schemas && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist

author: Andrei Hasna <andrei@hasna.com>
